title: Dashboard Views
excerpt: Similar to board views, it would be great to have different views on a dashboard. User case: Presenting to higher ups without having to scroll through a large main dashboard or have to go to a different dashboard in anot…

posts.author: Nataliaru (Natalia)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to board views, it would be great to have different views on a dashboard. User case: Presenting to higher ups without having to scroll through a large main dashboard or have to go to a different dashboard in another workspace.
